title: GripFieldConfig
description: Per-rally configuration of pace-note fields. Each rally defines which fields appear on a pacenote (name, kind, grid placement, render/TTS order, optional inline chip vocabulary). Pace notes then store their values as a JSON object keyed by field.key. Different rallies and disciplines can use entirely different shorthand systems by shipping different field configs.

field.description: A single pace-note field. The combination of key + kind + grid determines where it lives, how it's input, and how it renders.

key.description: Unique field identifier within the rally. Used as the property name under paceNote.fieldValues.

label.description: Display label shown on the canvas slot and pickers.

kind.description: How the field is entered. chips = pick from an inline vocabulary; freetext = type any string; number = numeric input (e.g. distance).

grid.description: Placement on the rally's input grid. Origin top-left.

scaleW.description: Hint: render-time scale width to fit content.

scaleH.description: Hint: render-time scale height to fit content (e.g. for repeatable freetext).

repeatable.description: If true, fieldValues[key] is an array of primitives; otherwise a single primitive.

renderOrder.description: Sequence order when multiple fields share a grid cell (same col/row/w/h). For example, caution + direction + severity stacked in one slot use renderOrder to decide which renders first. Across distinct cells the spatial layout determines order; renderOrder breaks ties within a cell. Lower = earlier.

ttsOrder.description: Sequence order in which this field's value(s) are spoken via TTS. Follows the same shared-cell semantics as renderOrder but may diverge if a crew speaks fields in a different order than they read them.

justify.description: Text alignment of the rendered slot value. Defaults to center.

chips.description: kind:'chips' only — the inline vocabulary for this field. Each chip is one allowed value.

step.description: kind:'number' only — increment for scrollers / steppers.

defaultValue.description: kind:'number' only — initial value when the field is activated.

numeric.description: Optional augmentation for kind:'chips' fields — also exposes a numeric scroller alongside the chip grid. The value stored in fieldValues can be either a chip's value (string) or a number, whichever the user picked most recently.

maxLines.description: kind:'freetext' only — soft cap on the number of lines rendered.

chip.description: One entry in a chips-kind field's vocabulary.

value.description: Canonical label stored on pace notes.

audible.description: Optional TTS override if the spoken form differs from the label.

angle.description: Tilt angle in degrees, used by severity-like fields placed on a compass dial.

schemaVersion.description: Version of the field-config schema this document conforms to.

promptOrder.description: Ordered list of field keys the recce UI's 'Next:' prompt strip cycles through. After each tap the strip advances to the next field in this list that is still empty on the current note. Fields not listed here are never auto-prompted (users can still tap their slot to edit). Optional — consumers may default to walking every chips-kind field by renderOrder when absent.
